name: Gratto Electric
tagline: Locally owned Santa Rosa electricians for panels, EV chargers, and remodels.
seoDescription: Gratto Electric is a locally owned, licensed electrical contractor in Santa Rosa led by owner Scott — panel upgrades, EV charging stations, generator hookups

sections.heading: Santa Rosa electricians, owner on the job
sections.subheading: Gratto Electric is a locally owned, licensed electrical contractor handling panel upgrades, EV charging, generators, and remodel wiring across Sonoma County — with owner Scott personally on the work.
badges: Roughly a decade of electrical experience
Panel upgrades, EV charging & generator hookups

sections.heading: An electrician who answers the phone
body: Gratto Electric is a locally owned and operated electrical contractor based in Santa Rosa, run by owner Scott with roughly a decade of experience in the trade. The work spans everything a Sonoma County home or remodel needs — from a simple lighting circuit to a full panel upgrade.

Neighbors know Scott for professional, high-quality workmanship and for being a straightforward, trusted resource. As homes add electric vehicles, generators, and hot tubs, Gratto Electric handles the panel capacity, EV charging stations, and transfer switches that make it all work safely.
highlights: Licensed, insured electrical contractor — locally owned & operated
Roughly a decade of electrical experience in Sonoma County
Panel upgrades, EV charging & generator hookups a specialty
New construction, remodels, lighting & A/C circuits

items.title: Electrical Panel Upgrades
items.description: Service and panel upgrades that add the capacity modern homes need, done to code and inspected.

items.title: EV Charging Station Installation
items.description: Level 2 EV charger installs sized and wired correctly for your vehicle and your panel.

items.title: Generator Hookups & Transfer Switches
items.description: Standby and portable generator hookups with transfer switches so the lights stay on.

items.title: Lighting Installation
items.description: Interior and exterior lighting, recessed cans, and fixtures installed cleanly.

items.title: New Construction & Remodel Wiring
items.description: Full wiring for new builds, additions, and kitchen and bath remodels.

items.title: A/C & Hot Tub Circuits
items.description: Dedicated circuits and hookups for air conditioning and hot tubs.

items.title: Reach out
items.body: Call or message Gratto Electric and tell us what you need.

items.title: We assess
items.body: We look at the details and talk through the right approach with you.

items.title: We do the work
items.body: Our team handles it properly, keeping you in the loop along the way.

items.title: You’re set
items.body: The job’s done right, and we stand behind it.

items.title: Licensed, Insured Electrical Contractor —
items.body: Properly credentialed, so the work is covered and done to standard.

sections.body: Find us at Santa Rosa, CA 95405. Call (707) 338-5259 — we’re glad to help.
